title: varronia lanata
intro: Varronia lanata, also known as the hairy varronia, is a plant species native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and fight bacterial infections. The plant is rich in flavonoids and tannins, which are responsible for its health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Varronia lanata can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and wounds.
